news.t: First Trust Expands Its Global Product Suite with Launch of WCMG

holdings.infoBox: WCMG is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nebius Group stock at 6.73%, Alphabet at 5.30%, Rolls-Royce Holdings at 5.00%, Kioxia Holdings at 4.68%, and Interactive Brokers Group at 3.37%.

overview.description: The First Trust WCM Global Equity ETF (WCMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed and invests in global equities selected through a value-oriented approach. The strategy focuses on companies viewed as undervalued with durable competitive positions across developed, emerging, and frontier markets. WCMG was launched on Apr 21, 2026 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: First Trust Expands Its Global Product Suite with Launch of WCMG
data.text: WHEATON, Ill.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--First Trust Advisors L.P. ("First Trust"), a leading exchange-traded fund ("ETF") provider ranked #1 Best Fund Family in the World Equity category by Barron's for 2025,...
